stories.title: All 48 teams in the World Cup have played once: It...
stories.summary: Every team in the World Cup has played one game, so let's react -- or, because it's such a small sample size -- overreact.

stories.title: Ranking Europe's top clubs by player performance a...
stories.summary: Players from Bayern, Real Madrid and Liverpool have impressed, but which clubs have been repped best?

stories.title: NHL clears Babcock to coach amid Oilers' interest
stories.summary: Following an investigation into his brief tenure with the Blue Jackets in 2023, the NHL has cleared Mike Babcock to coach again amid the Oilers' interest in hiring him.

stories.title: Dolan says second apron not an option for Knicks
stories.summary: On the heels of the Knicks' first NBA title in 53 years, owner James Dolan told WFAN radio Wednesday that he will not go into the punitive second apron to keep his team intact for the 2026-27 season.

stories.title: Brewers' Priester to have thoracic outlet surgery
stories.summary: Milwaukee Brewers right-hander Quinn Priester will undergo season-ending surgery for thoracic outlet syndrome and is expected to be sidelined for eight to 10 months.
